channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: Einsia/OpenChronicle
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
item.description: Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik AI, Krea AI, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

item.title: doggy8088/andrej-karpathy-skills
item.description: A single AGENTS.md file to improve GitHub Copilot CLI behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

item.title: ksimback/tech-debt-skill
item.description: Claude Code skill that produces a thorough, file-cited tech debt audit of an entire codebase

item.title: patrick-toulme/pyptx
item.description: A Python DSL to write Nvidia PTX for Hopper and Blackwell in JAX and PyTorch

item.title: openclaw/clawsweeper
item.description: ClawSweeper scans all issues and PRs and suggest what we can close, and why. It runs every PR / Issue once a week.

item.title: alash3al/stash
item.description: Stash — persistent memory layer for AI agents. Episodes, facts, and working context stored in Postgres. MCP server included. Self-hosted, single binary, no cloud required.

item.title: thClaws/thClaws
item.description: Open-source agent harness platform. Native Rust, multi-provider, runs on your own machine. Sovereign by design.

item.title: Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
item.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw

item.title: nakagami/grdpwasm
item.description: (no description)

item.title: akinloluwami/avnac
item.description: (no description)

item.title: actuallyepic/background-computer-use
item.description: (no description)

item.title: 0x0funky/agent-sprite-forge
item.description: Agent Skill for generating 2D sprite sheets, transparent PNG frames, and animated GIFs from prompts.

item.title: ciembor/agent-rules-books
item.description: Ready-to-use Codex, Cursor, and Claude Code rules inspired by classic software engineering books.

item.title: h4ckf0r0day/obscura
item.description: The headless browser for AI agents and web scraping

item.title: matz/spinel
item.description: (no description)

item.title: russellromney/honker
item.description: SQLite extension + bindings for Postgres NOTIFY/LISTEN semantics with durable queues, streams, pub/sub, and scheduler

item.title: op7418/guizang-ppt-skill
item.description: guizang-ppt-skill

item.title: refactoringhq/tolaria
item.description: (no description)

item.title: deepseek-ai/TileKernels
item.description: A kernel library written in tilelang

item.title: google/agents-cli
item.description: The CLI and skills that turn any coding assistant into an expert at creating, evaluating, and deploying AI agents on Google Cloud.

item.title: YouMind-OpenLab/awesome-gpt-image-2
item.description: 🚀 World's largest GPT Image 2 prompt library, updated daily — 1000+ curated prompts with preview images, 16 languages. OpenAI's next-gen image model with pixel-perfect text rendering, cross-image consistency, and commercial-grade illustration. Free & open source.

item.title: openai/privacy-filter
item.description: OpenAI Privacy Filter

item.title: google/skills
item.description: Agent Skills for Google products and technologies

item.title: google-labs-code/design.md
item.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

item.title: huggingface/ml-intern
item.description: 🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models

item.title: OpenCoworkAI/open-codesign
item.description: Open-source Claude Design alternative. One-click import your Claude Code / Codex API key. Prompt → prototype / slides / PDF. Multi-model (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi, GLM, Ollama). BYOK, local-first, MIT.

item.title: brexhq/CrabTrap
item.description: An LLM-as-a-judge HTTP proxy to secure agents in production

item.title: TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
item.description: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.

item.title: tractorjuice/arc-kit
item.description: Enterprise Architecture Governance & Vendor Procurement Toolkit

item.title: PerryTS/perry
item.description: A native TypeScript compiler written in Rust. Compiles TypeScript directly to executables using SWC and LLVM.

item.title: tw93/Kami
item.description: 👩‍🚒 Good content deserves good paper.

item.title: VoltAgent/awesome-claude-design
item.description: Awesome Claude Design: 68 ready-to-use design system inspirations in DESIGN.md format. Drop one in, scaffold a full UI in one shot.

item.title: NikolayS/pgque
item.description: PgQue – Zero-bloat Postgres queue. One SQL file to install, pg_cron to tick.

item.title: shivampkumar/trellis-mac
item.description: (no description)
